example: We must abide by the rules of the competition.
exampleTranslation: 我们必须遵守比赛规则。

example: Wildlife abounds in this national park.
exampleTranslation: 这个国家公园里野生动物很多。

example: Keep abreast of the latest developments in science.
exampleTranslation: 跟上科学的最新发展。

example: He decided to abstain from drinking alcohol.
exampleTranslation: 他决定戒酒。

meaning: v. 称赞；欢呼 n. 称赞
example: The novel was acclaimed as a masterpiece.
exampleTranslation: 这部小说被誉为杰作。

example: The police arrested his accomplice as well.
exampleTranslation: 警方也逮捕了他的同伙。

example: Interest will accrue on the savings account.
exampleTranslation: 储蓄账户将产生利息。

example: She is adept at handling difficult customers.
exampleTranslation: 她善于处理难缠的客户。

example: The advent of the internet changed everything.
exampleTranslation: 互联网的出现改变了一切。

example: He faced a formidable adversary in the debate.
exampleTranslation: 他在辩论中面对一个强大的对手。

example: She grew up in an affluent family.
exampleTranslation: 她在一个富裕家庭长大。

example: In the aftermath of the earthquake, many were homeless.
exampleTranslation: 地震后，许多人无家可归。

example: The union agitated for better working conditions.
exampleTranslation: 工会为更好的工作条件而鼓动。

example: The flag was flying aloft in the wind.
exampleTranslation: 旗帜在高空迎风飘扬。

example: He amassed a great fortune through real estate.
exampleTranslation: 他通过房地产积累了巨额财富。

example: Our neighbor is an amiable old gentleman.
exampleTranslation: 我们的邻居是一位和蔼可亲的老绅士。

example: The mother waited in anguish for news of her child.
exampleTranslation: 母亲痛苦地等待着孩子的消息。

meaning: v. 吞并；附加 n. 附件
example: The territory was annexed by the neighboring country.
exampleTranslation: 这片领土被邻国吞并了。

example: There is a long history of antagonism between the two groups.
exampleTranslation: 这两个群体之间有长期的敌对历史。

meaning: adj. 令人震惊的；可怕的
example: The living conditions in the slums are appalling.
exampleTranslation: 贫民窟的生活条件令人震惊。

example: The expert appraised the painting at $1 million.
exampleTranslation: 专家评估这幅画价值100万美元。

example: She is an ardent supporter of environmental protection.
exampleTranslation: 她是环境保护的热心支持者。

example: His arrogant attitude made him unpopular.
exampleTranslation: 他的傲慢态度使他不受欢迎。

meaning: v. 清楚表达 adj. 口才好的
example: She is highly articulate and persuasive.
exampleTranslation: 她口才极好且很有说服力。

example: He aspires to become a renowned scientist.
exampleTranslation: 他立志成为一位著名的科学家。

example: The president was assassinated in 1963.
exampleTranslation: 总统于1963年被暗杀。

meaning: n. 审计；审查 v. 审计
example: The company undergoes an annual financial audit.
exampleTranslation: 公司每年进行财务审计。

example: She took a part-time job to augment her income.
exampleTranslation: 她做了一份兼职来增加收入。

example: The government imposed austerity measures to reduce debt.
exampleTranslation: 政府实施紧缩措施以减少债务。

example: The aviation industry has grown rapidly.
exampleTranslation: 航空业发展迅速。

example: The negotiations took place against a backdrop of violence.
exampleTranslation: 谈判在暴力背景下进行。

example: The results of the ballot will be announced tomorrow.
exampleTranslation: 投票结果将于明天公布。

example: The company filed for bankruptcy last month.
exampleTranslation: 该公司上个月申请破产。

example: The lighthouse served as a beacon for ships.
exampleTranslation: 灯塔充当了船舶的指路明灯。

example: The tumor turned out to be benign.
exampleTranslation: 肿瘤结果是良性的。

example: The celebrity was besieged by reporters.
exampleTranslation: 这位名人被记者团团围住。

example: The two countries signed a bilateral trade agreement.
exampleTranslation: 两国签署了双边贸易协定。

example: The bill received bipartisan support in Congress.
exampleTranslation: 该法案在国会获得了两党的支持。

example: The future looks bleak for the coal industry.
exampleTranslation: 煤炭行业的前景黯淡。

meaning: n. 大错 v. 犯大错
example: The politician made a serious diplomatic blunder.
exampleTranslation: 这位政治家犯了一个严重的外交错误。

example: The evidence bolstered his case.
exampleTranslation: 证据支持了他的论点。

meaning: n. 违反；破裂 v. 突破
example: This is a breach of contract.
exampleTranslation: 这是违约行为。

meaning: n. 官僚主义；官僚机构
example: Excessive bureaucracy slows down decision-making.
exampleTranslation: 过度的官僚主义拖慢了决策。

example: The flood was a terrible calamity for the region.
exampleTranslation: 洪水对该地区是一场可怕的灾难。

example: The national census is conducted every ten years.
exampleTranslation: 全国人口普查每十年进行一次。

example: A coalition of parties formed the new government.
exampleTranslation: 政党联盟组成了新政府。

example: The government denied using coercive measures.
exampleTranslation: 政府否认使用强制措施。

example: His views coincide with mine on this issue.
exampleTranslation: 在这个问题上他的观点与我的相符。

meaning: v. 委任 n. 委员会；佣金
example: The report was commissioned by the government.
exampleTranslation: 这份报告是政府委托编制的。

example: Oil is one of the world's most valuable commodities.
exampleTranslation: 石油是世界上最有价值的商品之一。
